title: Rapidly Growing HVAC Company in North Texas | Turnkey Operations
supportTraining: The Seller is willing to provide a transition period and prolonged employment with standard market compensation
description:
- Owner willing to stay on through long-term employment agreement
- High-growth, asset-light HVAC services business serving residential and light commercial customers across the DFW metroplex
- 80% residential / 20% commercial
- Lean operating model utilizing a flexible 1099 contractor labor force, enabling rapid scaling with minimal fixed overhead
- Owner-light structure with day-to-day field execution handled by independent technicians and centralized scheduling support
- High-margin service profile with strong cash flow conversion and minimal ongoing capital expenditure requirements
- Established brand with 10+ years of operating history and deep technical expertise in HVAC diagnostics and system installation
- Clear runway for growth through technician capacity expansion, maintenance agreements, geographic densification, and immediate efficiency gains by implementing a modern ERP system
